response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at Naver, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments, deep fintech infrastructure expertise, and proven leadership scaling teams beyond 10 people — critical gaps for a CTO role requiring executive-level AI architecture and compliance rigor.
strengths: Exposure to agentic AI infrastructure at Naver (MCP frameworks)
Strong backend and distributed systems experience with event-driven systems and low-latency apps
Proven track record in open-source tooling and developer productivity initiatives
concerns: No evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in financial or regulated contexts
Lacks demonstrable experience in fintech infrastructure (credit systems, working capital, compliance)
No clear evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
